name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, command, or capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

One sentence.

## Why

What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed approach

- Type: (skill / agent / command / mcp / workflow / system / adapter)
- Domain: (pm / engineering / design / ops / foundational / meta)
- Adapter targets: (which IDEs need to support this?)

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about?
